# `rendered/` — Agent Guide

Tracked render proofs for the published exemplar.

**Contents.** `template_textbook.html`, `template_textbook_combined.{pdf,docx,epub}`, and `zenodo_record.json` — the deposited artifacts that double-publication points at.

**Contract.** Regenerated by the pipeline + `publish_project_release.py`; these are the citable proofs, not working output.

See the project [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) and [`docs/`](../docs/) for the full map.
